Figure 4 FTIR spectra showing changes in absorbance when cells are infected with poliovirus. Spectra in the wavelength region of 650 -
3600 cm-1 show the absorbance of BGMK cells infected with different PV1 titers 101 - 104 PFU/ml at 8 h.p.i. Uninfected cells served as a control.
